name: ayon-design-skills
description: Design-focused Claude Code skills for the full UI workflow: gather inspiration, turn Figma into interactive prototypes, and run rigorous design reviews.

plugins.name: design-review
plugins.description: Review a running UI's visual and interaction design against a strict craft bar; reports findings and a prioritized fix plan.

plugins.name: figma-to-prototype
plugins.description: Turn a Figma design into a high-fidelity, interactive Next.js + Tailwind prototype, verified in a real browser.

plugins.name: gather-inspiration
plugins.description: Gather top-tier UI/UX inspiration — production-app screenshots, agency-grade style tiles, or a UX recommendation.

plugins.name: everything
plugins.description: All three design skills in one install — gather inspiration, build Figma prototypes, and run design reviews.
